top_5_fixes: No blocking fixes: v4 closes prior v3 recommendations on score precision policy, evidence IDs/baselines, risk trigger source+SLA tagging, roadmap dependency health indicators, and investor data-room actioning.
Harden evaluator reproducibility by externalizing rounding policy to validator config (single source of truth) instead of narrative fields.
Normalize competitor proof format into a strict template (baseline, current, delta, sample size, period) for fully uniform diligence review.
Add explicit risk ID references inside each next_actions item to complete bidirectional traceability with risk_register.
Convert compliance control strings into a structured control artifact table outside schema (control_id, owner, cadence, evidence_uri, pass_threshold) for audit operations.
